symbols.name: JobSchedulerTestHarness
symbols.summary: Provides an in-memory scheduler test harness with a controllable clock.

syntax.content: public sealed class JobSchedulerTestHarness

symbols.name: Create()
symbols.summary: Creates a fluent builder for scheduler tests.

syntax.content: public static JobSchedulerTestHarnessBuilder Create()

symbols.name: Create(Action, Action, Action, DateTimeOffset?)
symbols.summary: Creates the scheduler harness directly.

syntax.content: public static JobSchedulerTestHarness Create(Action configureJobs, Action configureServices = null, Action configureOptions = null, DateTimeOffset? nowUtc = null)

symbols.name: Advance(TimeSpan)
symbols.summary: Advances the clock by the supplied duration.

syntax.content: public void Advance(TimeSpan value)

symbols.name: AdvanceToAsync(DateTimeOffset)
symbols.summary: Advances the clock to the supplied UTC instant.

syntax.content: public Task AdvanceToAsync(DateTimeOffset targetUtc)

symbols.name: MaterializeAsync(int, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Materializes due trigger occurrences.

syntax.content: public Task>> MaterializeAsync(int maxCatchUpOccurrences = 100, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: MaterializeDueTriggersAsync(int, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Materializes due trigger occurrences.

syntax.content: public Task>> MaterializeDueTriggersAsync(int maxCatchUpOccurrences = 100, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: ListReadyOccurrencesAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Lists ready occurrences.

syntax.content: public Task> ListReadyOccurrencesAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: DispatchAsync(object, JobDispatchOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Dispatches a job without waiting.

syntax.content: public Task> DispatchAsync(object data = null, JobDispatchOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TJob : class, IJob

symbols.name: DispatchAsync(string, object, JobDispatchOptions, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Dispatches a named job without waiting.

syntax.content: public Task> DispatchAsync(string jobName, object data = null, JobDispatchOptions options = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: DispatchAndWaitAsync(object, JobDispatchOptions, TimeSpan?, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Dispatches and waits for the terminal execution result.

syntax.content: public Task> DispatchAndWaitAsync(object data = null, JobDispatchOptions options = null, TimeSpan? timeout = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default) where TJob : class, IJob

symbols.name: ExecuteOccurrenceAsync(Guid, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Executes a stored occurrence.

syntax.content: public Task> ExecuteOccurrenceAsync(Guid occurrenceId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: RunDueAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Executes the first ready occurrence.

syntax.content: public Task> RunDueAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: RunAllDueAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Executes all ready occurrences.

syntax.content: public Task>> RunAllDueAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: RunDueBatchAsync(int, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Executes a bounded batch of ready occurrences.

syntax.content: public Task>> RunDueBatchAsync(int maxCount, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: SweepAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Executes one scheduler sweep.

syntax.content: public Task SweepAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: GetOccurrenceAsync(Guid, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Loads one occurrence.

syntax.content: public Task GetOccurrenceAsync(Guid occurrenceId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: GetOccurrencesAsync(string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Loads occurrences filtered by job and optional trigger.

syntax.content: public Task>> GetOccurrencesAsync(string jobName = null, string triggerName = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: FindOccurrenceAsync(string, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Finds one occurrence by job and optional trigger.

syntax.content: public Task FindOccurrenceAsync(string jobName, string triggerName = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.summary: Gets registered job definitions.

syntax.content: public IReadOnlyList GetJobs()

symbols.name: GetTriggers(string)
symbols.summary: Gets registered triggers for a job.

syntax.content: public IReadOnlyList GetTriggers(string jobName)

symbols.summary: Gets execution attempts for an occurrence.

syntax.content: public Task> GetExecutionsAsync(Guid occurrenceId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: GetHistoryAsync(Guid, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Gets retained execution history for an occurrence.

syntax.content: public Task> GetHistoryAsync(Guid occurrenceId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: GetDependenciesAsync(Guid, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Gets active dependencies for an occurrence.

syntax.content: public Task> GetDependenciesAsync(Guid occurrenceId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: GetLeasesAsync(CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Gets leases currently known to the harness store.

syntax.content: public Task> GetLeasesAsync(CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: GetBatchAsync(string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Loads a batch by external batch identifier.

syntax.content: public Task GetBatchAsync(string batchId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: GetBatchOccurrencesAsync(string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Loads batch child occurrences.

syntax.content: public Task> GetBatchOccurrencesAsync(string batchId, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.summary: Ensures that retained history contains a matching event.

syntax.content: public Task AssertHistoryContainsAsync(Guid occurrenceId, string eventName, string messageContains = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: AssertRetryAttemptsAsync(Guid, int, JobOccurrenceStatus, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Ensures that retry attempts and occurrence status match expectations.

syntax.content: public Task AssertRetryAttemptsAsync(Guid occurrenceId, int expectedAttempts, JobOccurrenceStatus expectedOccurrenceStatus, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: AssertBlockedDependencyAsync(Guid, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Ensures that an occurrence remains blocked by dependencies.

syntax.content: public Task AssertBlockedDependencyAsync(Guid occurrenceId, string blockedReasonContains = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

symbols.name: AssertBatchStatusAsync(string, JobBatchStatus, int?, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Ensures that a batch has the expected roll-up status.

syntax.content: public Task AssertBatchStatusAsync(string batchId, JobBatchStatus expectedStatus, int? expectedAcceptedCount = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

syntax.content: public IServiceProvider Services { get; }
